subject: English
title: Formal Debate
tagline: Master formal debate structure — proposing, opposing and rebuttal!

steps.label: State the Motion
steps.description: Read out the motion being debated so everyone understands the topic.

steps.label: Proposing Argument
steps.description: The proposing team argues in favour of the motion with clear points.

steps.label: Opposing Argument
steps.description: The opposing team argues against the motion with their own points.

steps.label: Rebuttal
steps.description: Each side responds directly to the other side's strongest point.

steps.label: Closing Summary
steps.description: Each side sums up why their argument was stronger.

steps.label: Audience Vote
steps.description: The audience votes on which side argued the motion more convincingly.
